testCase.name: Task Controller - Full API Test Suite Tasks API should return the default list of tasks
Task Controller - Full API Test Suite Tasks API should add a new task and return it with a unique ID
Task Controller - Full API Test Suite Tasks API should update an existing task title
Task Controller - Full API Test Suite Tasks API should remove a task by ID
Task Controller - Full API Test Suite Tasks API should search tasks by title using ?search= query
Task Controller - Full API Test Suite Names API should return default list of names
Task Controller - Full API Test Suite Names API should add a new name and handle IDs correctly
Task Controller - Full API Test Suite Names API should update a name entry by ID
Task Controller - Full API Test Suite Names API should remove a name entry by ID
Task Controller - Full API Test Suite Names API should filter names by search query
Task Controller - Full API Test Suite Error Handling should return 400 for missing required fields
Task Controller - Full API Test Suite Error Handling should return 404 for non-existent IDs on DELETE/PUT
Task Controller - Full API Test Suite Sorting Functionality should return tasks in alphabetical order when ?sort=abc is used
